title: Purpose
summary: Orchestrated shipping pipeline for AI-assisted game teams.
content: Orchestrated shipping pipeline for AI-assisted game teams.

title: Goals
summary: - preserve speed without sacrificing quality - scale review depth to the change risk - keep release work cheap for narrow changes - run the full pipeline for player-facing or high-
content:
- preserve speed without sacrificing quality
- scale review depth to the change risk
- keep release work cheap for narrow changes
- run the full pipeline for player-facing or high-risk work

title: Ship Lite
summary: Use for: - narrow code changes - low-risk local work - non-player-facing fixes - isolated feature work Responsibilities: - build or typecheck - targeted review routing - focused te
content:
Use for:

- narrow code changes
- low-risk local work
- non-player-facing fixes
- isolated feature work

Responsibilities:

- build or typecheck
- targeted review routing
- focused tests
- minimal fix-forward
- cheap verification

title: Ship Full
summary: Use for: - player-facing changes - infra or deploy changes - economy changes - security-sensitive changes - multi-system work Responsibilities: - full review routing - broader test
content:
Use for:

- player-facing changes
- infra or deploy changes
- economy changes
- security-sensitive changes
- multi-system work

Responsibilities:

- full review routing
- broader test coverage
- stronger release verification
- patch-note generation
- player-risk summary
- rollback-aware release prep

title: Game Overlays
summary: - balance - UX - security - infra - player-facing patch notes
content:
- balance
- UX
- security
- infra
- player-facing patch notes

title: Key Question
summary: What is the cheapest safe path to confidence for this change?
content: What is the cheapest safe path to confidence for this change?
